summary: Completed testing of Instagram-style Profile page redesign and Feed bookmark functionality. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Profile page shows 5 tabs (Posts, Sessions, Videos, Saved, Tagged), Feed bookmark button saves/unsaves posts with toast confirmation.
critical_code_review_comments: Profile content endpoints well-structured with proper pagination (limit/offset)
SavedPost model correctly tracks user_id and post_id with cascade deletes
TaggedMedia supports both posts and gallery_items tagging
Profile stats endpoint efficiently returns all 5 counts in single call
Feed bookmark button has proper optimistic UI update with error rollback
Profile tabs use consistent data-testid attributes for testing

verified_features.PROFILE STATS: GET /api/profile/{user_id: PASS - returns posts, videos, session_shots, saved, tagged counts
verified_features.PROFILE POSTS: GET /api/profile/{user_id: PASS - returns user's posts for grid
verified_features.CHECK SAVED: GET /api/posts/{post_id}/is: PASS - checks if post is saved
verified_features.FRONTEND: Profile page Instagram-style l: PASS - verified with avatar, stats, bio section
verified_features.FRONTEND: 5 tabs visible: PASS - Posts, Sessions, Videos, Saved, Tagged all with data-testid
verified_features.FRONTEND: Feed bookmark button: PASS - click saves post with 'Post saved!' toast, icon fills yellow

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_profile_content@example.com test user for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile content APIs fully tested - all 5 tabs work. Feed bookmark functionality verified working with toast confirmation. Profile page has Instagram-style layout with avatar, stats (posts/followers/following), bio, role badge, and 5 content tabs. The save/bookmark API uses query params (user_id) not body.
